business.name: Handyman Kevin
business.tagline: Nashville's fix-it guy with the truck full of tools

hero.headline: The handyman Nashville *actually calls*
hero.subheadline: Same-day service with a truck that has every tool. No job too small, no problem too weird.

services_section.label: WHAT KEVIN FIXES
services_section.heading: One call handles it all
services_section.subheading: From garbage disposals to ceiling fans, microwave swaps to outlet installs

services.title: Appliance Installation
services.description: Microwaves, garbage disposals, and anything that needs mounting or hooking up.

services.title: Electrical Work
services.description: Outlets, switches, ceiling fans, and basic wiring jobs done right.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: The weird problems, broken things, and honey-do lists nobody else wants to tackle.

services.title: Lawn Care
services.description: Weekly mowing service that shows up when it's supposed to.

about.heading: Kevin shows up with the right tools
about.body: Nashville handyman with a fully-stocked truck and a reputation for getting it done the first time.

reviews.name: Tony S.
reviews.text: Can't speak highly enough about Kevin! Same-day service for our microwave swap. Professional, polite, and got it done with perfection.

reviews.name: Katherine I.
reviews.text: Very friendly with a truck outfitted with every tool he might need. Had great ideas for approaching my problem I'd been hesitant to fix.

reviews.name: Nathan W.
reviews.text: Kevin was great to work with. Showed up every week for mowing, very reliable. Also replaced a ceiling fan and outlet. Great job Kev!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Kevin works all over Nashville
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Middle Tennessee

cta.heading: Ready to get it fixed?
cta.body: Call Kevin today for your free quote. Same friendly guy, same reliable truck, same job done right.
